name: Documentation update
description: Edit Markdown documentation only — no product code, no schema, no config changes. Typo fixes, runbook clarifications, README polish, etc.
architectHints: Restrict the diff to .md files. If the task asks for a code change, refuse and surface that to the operator instead of straying.
Match the tone, voice, and heading depth of the surrounding documentation.
Cross-link rather than duplicate: if a fact already lives in another doc, link to it.
validatorRules: No non-doc files may appear in the diff.
Run any existing markdown linters or prose checks if configured; otherwise skip.
Verify that internal links in the changed files still resolve.
reviewerRubric: Does every claim in the new copy match the actual current behaviour of the system?
Is the change skimmable — headings, short paragraphs, code blocks where appropriate?
